name: Troy Dixon
title: Founder
bio: Mr. Dixon is a seasoned insurance professional with a career spanning over four decades. He holds licenses in Life & Health as well as Property & Casualty insurance and attended Southern University, majoring in Computer Science. Mr. Dixon began his career in 1984 with Life of Georgia Insurance Company, later joining Metropolitan Life. In 1994, he founded The Petra Group and successfully operated as an independent agent for ten years, managing three locations. He later partnered with Taylor & Sons Insurance Agency, becoming the firm's first minority owner in 2005. Under his leadership, the company expanded into Mississippi and began offering Section 125 cafeteria plan administration, with premium volume nearly tripling within two years. Since 2008, Mr. Dixon has focused exclusively on growing The Petra Group Insurance and Financial Services.

name: Kevin Dickerson
title: VP of Agency Development
bio: Kevin is a seasoned business management professional with over 20 years of experience driving operational excellence, leading large-scale projects, and fostering strategic partnerships. He holds a Bachelor's Degree in Business Management from Southern University and A&M College. Since March 2019, he has served as Owner and Managing Partner of Dominion Companies, overseeing comprehensive insurance operations nationwide. At The Petra Group, Kevin specializes in worksite benefits for small, medium, and large organizations. Previously, he managed IT resources for over 46,000 students and staff across 83 schools in East Baton Rouge Parish, with a device inventory valued at approximately $10 million. His career also includes substantial retail management experience, notably at Walmart in Zachary where he supervised over 120 associates.

name: Debbie Kaglear
title: VP of Operations
bio: Debbie is a seasoned insurance professional with over two decades of experience in the insurance industry. She specializes in health insurance solutions, including Medicare plans and voluntary benefits, supporting individuals, families, and businesses as they navigate complex coverage decisions. She is recognized for her client-focused approach and commitment to clear communication, delivering practical, informed solutions that support long-term health and financial security. With more than 20 years of licensure, Debbie brings extensive knowledge of health insurance markets and regulatory environments. She is the founder of a nonprofit organization focused on assisting underserved individuals and families and holds a Master's Degree in Theological Studies. Debbie provides mentorship to individuals seeking guidance in career development and personal growth.

name: Sarita St. Etienne Dixon
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Sarita Dixon proudly serves as Chief Financial Officer of The Petra Group, bringing a broad range of expertise in executive administration, finance, and operational leadership. As a senior officer, she plays a key role in strategic planning, financial oversight, and day-to-day operations execution. Known for her meticulous attention to detail and commitment to accuracy, Sarita oversees all financial and administrative functions with precision and integrity. She attended the University of New Orleans and Tulane University, beginning her professional career at a medical clinic where she advanced to Business Manager. She later accepted an executive administrative role at Tulane University's School of Public Health and Tropical Medicine. Prior to joining The Petra Group, Sarita co-owned a Baton Rouge staffing company and served as Business Administrator/CFO for a medical staffing service in New Orleans.

name: Leroy D. Simpson
title: Personal Finance Professional, Psy.D
bio: Leroy is a professional investment portfolio manager and securities trader helping people and businesses grow their money safely over long periods. Before trading or investing, he conducts deep research on companies to ensure they are healthy and honest. He uses a special mix of math and behavioral science to make smart, calm choices even when markets behave erratically. His main goal is to help individuals, small businesses, charities, and private groups build portfolios of wealth or retirement that grow larger every year while providing steady cash flow. His specialties include Investment Portfolio Management for long-term growth and value investing, Securities Trading and execution for short-term price appreciation, Retirement Planning, and Specialized Life Insurance and Annuities for high cashflow situations.

name: Gilbert "Doc" Thomas
title: Broker
bio: "Doc" started his professional life with Central Louisiana Electric Company from 1979-1999 as a Meter Reading Specialist and Manager, one of seven statewide selected for the company's Professional Development Employees Management Training Program. From 1995-1999, he worked part-time as a Life Insurance Specialist with Curtis Dugas Allstate Agency. In 1999, "Doc" became an Allstate Exclusive Agency owner, specializing in employee benefits as he recognized the need for valuable, affordable, and reliable supplemental benefits for the workforce. As an Exclusive Agent, he serviced the community for 20 years and won numerous awards for writing Auto, Home, Life, and Business insurance. In 2019, "Doc" became an independent insurance broker with The Petra Group where he specializes in employee benefits as an Enrollment Coordinator, Benefits Advisor, and Enrollment Specialist.

name: Harry Christophe
title: Benefits Consultant
bio: Harry Christophe Jr. is a licensed insurance broker based in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, with more than 15 years of experience helping individuals, families, and small businesses navigate the complexities of healthcare coverage. He is committed to simplifying insurance decisions by educating clients and providing clear, customized solutions tailored to their unique needs. Harry specializes in group health insurance, Medicare Supplement plans, Medicare Advantage plans, Part D prescription drug coverage, and life insurance solutions. He is known for delivering personalized service and helping clients make informed decisions that maximize benefits while protecting their health and financial future. His client-focused approach emphasizes transparency, reliability, and long-term support.

name: John Lizana
title: Benefits Advisor
bio: John Lizana is an experienced Medicare Supplement Specialist with over 40 years of experience in the insurance industry. He brings extensive expertise in helping clients navigate Medicare coverage options and secured supplemental insurance solutions that protect their long-term health and financial security.

name: Troy Jones
title: Strategic Partner
bio: Troy worked at Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Louisiana for 24 years, holding multiple roles in Auditing, Marketing, and Group Sales. As an Account Executive, he was instrumental in developing and growing the Louisiana Bankers Association, Louisiana Association of Business Industry, and the Louisiana Municipal Association (LMA). Troy was the first minority Account Manager and Account Executive in the company's 82-year history and was recognized as one of the top producing Account Executives in the state for several years. In 2019, he left Blue Cross to further his insurance career by partnering with former colleague Jeff Wampold at Wampold Insurance Company, LLC. In summer 2020, Troy and his partners formed JJL&W Insurance Consulting Firm, LLC, where he cultivates important relationships while expanding business through organic growth and collaborations with local organizations.
